output:
PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin
POSTGRES_DB=n8n
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=222222222222222222222222
POSTGRES_USER=n8n
PG_MAJOR=16
PG_VERSION=16.13-1.pgdg12+1
PGDATA=/var/lib/postgresql/data
root:x:0:0:root:/root:/bin/bash
daemon:x:1:1:daemon:/usr/sbin:/usr/sbin/nologin
bin:x:2:2:bin:/bin:/usr/sbin/nologin
  n8n:
    depends_on:
    - postgres
    environment:
      AMOCRM_DOMAIN: ${AMOCRM_DOMAIN}
      AMOCRM_TOKEN: ${AMOCRM_TOKEN}
      DB_POSTGRESDB_DATABASE: n8n
      DB_POSTGRESDB_HOST: postgres
      DB_POSTGRESDB_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
      DB_POSTGRESDB_PORT: 5432
      DB_POSTGRESDB_USER: n8n
      DB_TYPE: postgresdb
      GENERIC_TIMEZONE: ${GENERIC_TIMEZONE}
      N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE: ${N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE}
      N8N_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD: ${N8N_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD}
      N8N_BASIC_AUTH_USER: ${N8N_BASIC_AUTH_USER}
      N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL: https://n8n.marbomebel.ru/
      N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY}
      N8N_HOST: n8n.marbomebel.ru
      N8N_PORT: 5678
      N8N_PROTOCOL: https
      N8N_PROXY_HOPS: '1'
--
    volumes:
    - n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n
  postgres:
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: n8n
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
      POSTGRES_USER: n8n
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16
    networks:
    - n8n-traefik_default
    ports:
    - 127.0.0.1:5432:5432
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
    - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  voice-app:
    image: nginx:alpine
    labels:
    - traefik.enable=true
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.rule=Host("n8n.marbomebel.ru") && PathPrefix("/voice")
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.entrypoints=websecure
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.tls=true
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.tls.certresolver=mytlschallenge
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.priority=100
    - traefik.http.middlewares.voice-strip.stripprefix.prefixes=/voice
--
volumes:
  n8n_data: null
  postgres_data: null
command: docker exec n8n-postgres-1 env | grep -iE 'POSTGRES|PG' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 cat /etc/passwd | head -3 && cat /opt/n8n/docker-compose.yml | grep -B2 -A10 postgres
